Government of Maharashtra

New Administration Building, 3rd Floor,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: May 8, 2026
Read: - 1) Finance Department Government Circular No. Meaning-2026 / Q. No.40 / Meaning-3, D. 09.04.2026.
The Government's Decisions:
Financial assistance for general expenses under the Integrated Child Development Services Scheme 2026-27
For the year Rakaana No. 3 in the Principal Account Head / Subhead / Target in Rakaana No. 2 in the following Returns:
Out of the budgetary provision mentioned herein, the total amount of Rs. 51.80 lakh (literal Rs.
One and a half lakh eighty thousand only) to the Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme and disbursement and expenditure.
It is being approved.
(Rs. in Lakhs)
2. The Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme, Navi Mumbai has provided the following:
The funds should be spent in the prescribed manner.
3. The said Government Decision was taken by the Finance Department vide Informal Reference No. 177 / Expenditure-6, dated 04.05.2026
Is being issued as agreed.
